title: Yijing Hexagram 10: Lu (Treading)
description: Hexagram 10 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 10 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Treading upon the tail of the tiger. It does not bite the man. Success. Heaven above, the lake below: the image of Treading.
